# Copilot instructions for Pandas to SQL Thinking Atlas

This repository is a reference atlas and skill pack.

- Use `.github/skills/pandas-sql-thinking-atlas/SKILL.md` as the local skill entrypoint.
- Prefer official framework docs and official repos.
- Explain the mental model shift before giving a long transliteration.
- Prefer native target-side patterns over source-side mimicry.
- Keep examples compact, practical, and reviewable.
